title: Nano-island-encapsulated cobalt single-atom catalysts for breaking activity-stability trade-off in Fenton-like reactions

跨学科关系.head: 单原子催化剂
跨学科关系.evidence: Single-atom catalysts (SACs) have been increasingly acknowledged for their performance in sustainable Fenton-like catalysis.

跨学科关系.head: 纳米岛封装单钴原子催化剂
跨学科关系.relation: enhances the activity and stability of activation
跨学科关系.evidence: Herein, we design a nano-island encapsulated single cobalt atom (CoSA/Zn.O-ZnO) catalyst to enhance the activity and stability of PMS activation for contaminant degradation via an "island-sea" synergistic effect.

跨学科关系.head: 氧化锌纳米颗粒
跨学科关系.evidence: In this configuration, small carrier-based ZnO nanoparticles (the "islands") are utilized to confine and stabilize Co single atoms.

跨学科关系.head: 氧化锌基底
跨学科关系.evidence: The expansive ZnO substrate (the "sea") upholds a neutral microenvironment within the reaction system.

跨学科关系.head: 纳米岛封装单钴原子催化剂
跨学科关系.relation: exhibits a remarkable selectivity in exclusively generating
跨学科关系.evidence: The CoSA/Zn.O-ZnO/PMS system exhibits a remarkable selectivity in exclusively generating sulfate radicals (SO4•-), leading to a complete removal of various recalcitrant pollutants within a shorter period.

跨学科关系.head: 硫酸根自由基
跨学科关系.relation: leading to a complete removal of
跨学科关系.evidence: The CoSA/Zn.O-ZnO/PMS system exhibits a remarkable selectivity in exclusively generating sulfate radicals (SO4•-), leading to a complete removal of various recalcitrant pollutants within a shorter period.

跨学科关系.head: 纳米岛封装单钴原子催化剂
跨学科关系.evidence: The design effectively breaks the activity-stability trade-off typically associated with SACs.

跨学科关系.head: 过硫酸氢盐高级氧化过程
跨学科关系.evidence: In recent years, the emerged heterogenous peroxymonosulfate-based advanced oxidation processes (PMS-AOPs) have gained recognition as effective means to generate reactive oxygen species (ROS) and eradicate refractory organic pollutants in wastewater.

跨学科关系.head: 碳材料
跨学科关系.relation: commonly act as supports to anchor
跨学科关系.evidence: In the current SAC designs, carbon materials commonly act as supports to anchor single-atom catalytic sites.

概念: 纳米岛封装单钴原子催化剂
材料科学.rationale: 通过设计纳米岛结构和氧化锌基底材料，为单原子催化剂提供稳定载体和中性反应环境

环境科学技术.rationale: 评估催化剂在复杂水体中对顽固污染物的降解效能及环境适应性

title: High-entropy alloy enables multi-path electron synergism and lattice oxygen activation for enhanced oxygen evolution activity

跨学科关系.head: high-entropy alloys (HEAs)
跨学科关系.evidence: We reveal that high-entropy alloys (HEAs) can efficiently activate the LOM through synergistic multi-path electron transfer.

跨学科关系.head: high-entropy alloys (HEAs)
跨学科关系.evidence: Leveraging the lattice oxygen activation mechanism (LOM) is a strategy for boosting its activity.

跨学科关系.head: Ni-Co dual-site
跨学科关系.evidence: enabling effective LOM at the Ni-Co dual-site.

跨学科关系.head: NiFeCoCrW<sub>0.2</sub> HEA
跨学科关系.evidence: achieving an overpotential of 220 mV at a current density of 10 mA cm<sup>-2</sup>.

跨学科关系.head: high-entropy structure
跨学科关系.evidence: the high-entropy structure promotes the initiation of an efﬁcient electrocatalytic LOM pathway.

化学.rationale: 化学学科通过分析催化剂表面化学键变化和电解质溶液作用，为电催化反应机制提供分子层面的解释。

材料科学.rationale: 材料科学学科通过设计高熵合金的组分与结构特性，优化催化剂材料的多路径电子协同传输能力。

title: MXene-Assisted NiFe sulfides for high-performance anion exchange membrane seawater electrolysis

跨学科关系.head: MXene (Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>)
跨学科关系.evidence: Herein, we report a robust OER electrocatalyst for AEMSE by integrating MXene (Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>) with NiFe sulfides ((Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>)

跨学科关系.head: NiFe sulfides ((Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>)
跨学科关系.evidence: The strong interaction between (Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub> and Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> induces electron distribution to trigger lattice oxygen mechanism

跨学科关系.head: Ti-O-Fe bonding
跨学科关系.evidence: and particularly prohibits the dissolution of Fe species during OER process via the Ti-O-Fe bonding effectively

跨学科关系.head: MXene (Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>)
跨学科关系.evidence: Furthermore, the good retention of sulfates and the abundant groups of Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> provide effective Cl<sup>-</sup> resistance

跨学科关系.head: NiFe sulfides ((Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>)
跨学科关系.evidence: (Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub> achieves high OER activity (1.598 V@2 A cm<sup>-2</sup>)

跨学科关系.head: NiFe sulfides ((Ni,Fe)S<sub>2</sub>@Ti<sub>3</sub>C<sub>2</sub>)
跨学科关系.evidence: and long-term durability (1000 h) in seawater system

跨学科关系.head: anion exchange membrane seawater electrolysis
跨学科关系.evidence: Furthermore, AEMSE with industrial current density (0.5 A cm<sup>-2</sup>)

跨学科关系.head: Raney Ni cathode
跨学科关系.evidence: and Raney Ni cathode with electrolysis efficiency of 70%

跨学科关系.head: gas diffusion layer (GDL)
跨学科关系.evidence: The inﬂuence of pore size of the gas diffusion layer (GDL)

跨学科关系.head: anion exchange membranes
跨学科关系.evidence: difﬁdent anion exchange membranes on the performance of the electrolyzer were carried out

材料科学.rationale: 材料科学通过提供MXene与硫化物的复合材料和优化电极结构，显著提升了电解系统的稳定性和催化效率
